steps_raw.instruction: Verify the identity of the FFPE block to be cut against written request for sectioning.

Label all slides with a unique BEMS ID and slide number, corresponding to the written request and FFPE spatial map (below). A B C D 1 Slide# Slide Type Assay Recipient 2 1 Superfrost Plus H&E OHSU, HSR 3 2 Superfrost Plus Cyclic Immunofluorescence (Tumor Panel) HMS, Alyce Chen 4 3 Superfrost Plus Cyclic Immunofluorescence (Immune Panel) HMS, Alyce Chen 5 4 TOMO Multiplex IHC (Discovery Panel) OHSU, Sam Sivagnanam 6 5 Tanner Cyclic Immunofluorescence (Panel A) OHSU, Koei Chin 7 6 Tanner Cyclic Immunofluorescence (Panel B) OHSU, Koei Chin 8 7 Superfrost Plus Nanostring GeoMx Digital Spatial Profiler OHSU, KDL 9 8 Superfrost Plus H&E OHSU, HSR
Align block on microtome to minimize tissue loss.
Face into block at 5μm until full section of tissue is achieved.
Cut adequate ribbon at 5μm to cover all 8 serial sections.
Mount tissue sections onto appropriate slide types, maintaining serial order and orientation of sections.
Perform hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining on slides #1 and #8.
Place slides #2, 3, 5, and 6 in 55 °C oven overnight.
The next morning, raise the oven temperature to 65 °C for up to 01:00:00 . Note: Slides should be baked at 65 °C for at least 30 minutes.
Remove slides from oven. Place slides in slide boxes and store at room temperature.
Deliver slides #2 through #7 to BioLibrary for distribution.
